message:
fix(node): prevent integer overflow with saturating arithmetic in 6 modules

Replaces bare + 1 and += 1 on sequence counters and depth trackers
with saturating_add(1) to prevent panic on overflow in release builds
and wraparound in debug builds:

- artifact_persistence.rs: next_sequence counter
- policy_checkpoint.rs: next_seq counter (2 call sites)
- supervision.rs: escalation_depth tracker
- epoch_transition_barrier.rs: current_epoch + 1 target calculation
  and barrier_counter increment
- category_shift.rs: sequence counter in reporting pipeline
- trust_card.rs: trust score accumulation

These counters are incremented by external events (API calls, epoch
transitions) and could theoretically overflow in long-running nodes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
